description_long: This is a white ceramic cup with a cylindrical shape and a smoothly curved handle. The exterior is decorated with playful, cartoon-style illustrations including animals, a pencil with a face, and various small icons such as arrows, smiley faces, and sports balls. The cup features a prominent 'PROFILANCE GROUP' logo and text, along with additional branding elements and motifs scattered across the surface. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The interior is plain white, and the rim is slightly rounded for comfortable drinking. The surface finish is glossy, giving the cup a clean and polished appearance.
description: A white ceramic cup with a glossy finish, decorated with colorful cartoon illustrations and branding. It features a sturdy handle and playful motifs across its surface.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the cup with cartoon animals, a pencil character, and various small icons on a white background.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the handle and reveals an illustration of two elephants, along with more subtle background motifs.
description_view_2: The handle is centered in this view, showing its smooth, rounded attachment to the cup body and a glimpse of the illustrations on either side.
description_view_3: This view displays the 'PROFILANCE GROUP' logo, a dog illustration, and additional branding elements, with the handle visible to the left.
